title: season — field classification
description: Season carries commercial + calendrical reference data. No PII. The bulk of compliance responsibility is around FINANCIAL-record retention (late_registration_fee_cents changes generate 7-year audit rows) + SOC 2 CC6.3 change tracking (SeasonCurrentChanged is audit-critical because year-over-year reports pivot on the current season). Domain rows below Season (Team, AthleteEnrollment, Event, Session) inherit their own classification per their owning module.

regulated_financial: Season.late_registration_fee_cents (drives invoice line items when a late enrollment triggers the surcharge; every change writes to the audit trail with financial-record retention)
audit_log: Season.is_current (every flip written to `audits` — year-over-year reports pivot on this; audit-critical)
Season.start_date (every change post-in_progress written to `audits` with warn severity — affects enrolled athletes' bookings)
Season.end_date (every change post-in_progress written to `audits` with warn severity)
Season.sport_key (every change written to `audits` with critical severity — should never happen post-in_progress)
Season.late_registration_fee_cents (every change written to `audits` — financial-record retention 7 years)
Season.deleted_at (soft-delete + hard-delete written to `audits` + retained 7 years for financial records)

notes: Season carries NO PII. Names, slugs, colors are all tenant metadata. Season descriptions may reference programme + coach names (freeform text) — reviewers should treat them as internal-tier by default.

`sport_key` is a free-text opaque discriminator pre-Wave-3c sport registry. When the sport registry lands, sport_key changes will be gated additionally by an FK check + an is_active flag on the sport row.
`primary_color` is a hex string (`#RRGGBB`) — public, safe to render on invoices + PDFs alongside the tenant's branding.
The `capacity_target` field is informational only — the enrollment observer does NOT block enrollments when capacity_target is exceeded. It's a planning hint surfaced in dashboards.
`max_enrollments_per_athlete` is enforced downstream by the Wave 3 athlete-enrollment observer, not this module. This module ships the column; enrollment enforces the semantics.

SeasonCurrentChanged (audit event) is the highest-severity event on this row — YoY reporting queries pivot on `WHERE is_current=true`, so flipping the current season shifts the whole reporting frame. Every flip generates a mandatory audit row + a cannot-opt-out notification.

Season.description supports up to 4000 chars of freeform text — reviewers should NOT treat it as public because tenants sometimes paste operational notes into it. Response redactor keeps it internal-tier.
